title: scReportEnrichment Internal ORA Result Schema
description: Canonical internal representation of an over-representation analysis enrichment result row, as consumed by scReportEnrichment v0.1.0.

result_id.description: Unique identifier for this result row (e.g. ORA_0001).

comparison.description: Comparison, contrast, cell type, or group label for this result (e.g. B_cell_up, Cluster3).

database.description: Enrichment database or gene-set source (e.g. GO, KEGG, Reactome, Hallmark, custom).

ontology.description: Sub-ontology or subcategory (e.g. BP, CC, MF for GO; KEGG for KEGG). May be null.

q_value.description: Storey q-value or FDR. May be identical to p_adjust or null.

gene_ratio.description: Gene ratio string in A/B format (e.g. 5/100), or a numeric ratio, or null.

background_ratio.description: Background ratio string in A/B format, or null.

gene_count.description: Number of input genes overlapping with this term's gene set.

input_direction.description: Direction of gene expression change in the input. Not a claim about pathway activation/inhibition.

genes.description: List of individual gene identifiers/symbols for this term.

gene_ids_raw.description: Raw gene identifier string as provided in the input (e.g. semicolon-delimited).
